nasb.text: And He will judge the world in righteousness; He will execute judgment for the peoples with equity.

esv.text: and he judges the world with righteousness; he judges the peoples with uprightness.

cnv.text: 他必以公義審判世界， 按正直判斷萬民。

ccb.text: 祂要以公义审判世界， 在万民中伸张正义。

csbs.text: 是他以公义审判世界， 以正直审断万民。
